subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Some days ago a letter was dispatched; therefore, I write briefly. O servant of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان چند روز پیش مکتوبی ارسال گشت لهذا مختصرا مرقوم میشود ای بنده
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @martyrs and martyrdom, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
